title: onagra chrysantha var. parviflora
intro: Onagra chrysantha var. parviflora, also known as the small-flowered evening primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Onagraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Onagra chrysantha var. parviflora include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
